questions.question: What should the client send to the server to start a file transfer?
options: The file name and the contents of the file
The file name and a request to download the file
The contents of the file and a request to upload the file
The file name and a request to upload the file
questions.explanation: The client should send the file name and a request to upload the file to the server.

questions.question: How should the server respond if the requested file is found?
options: Send a 404 error message
Send a 200 OK message with the file contents
Send a 500 error message
Send a 404 error message with the file contents
questions.explanation: The server should send a 200 OK message with the file contents if the requested file is found.

questions.question: What should the server send to the client if the requested file is not found?
options: Send a 404 error message with the file name
Send a 200 OK message with the file name
Send a 500 error message with the file name
Send a 404 error message with the file name and contents
questions.explanation: The server should send a 404 error message with the file name if the requested file is not found.

questions.question: What should the client do if the server sends a 404 error message?
options: Reattempt the request
Cancel the request
Send the file name again
Display an error message
questions.explanation: The client should cancel the request if the server sends a 404 error message.

questions.question: What should the client do if the server sends a 500 error message?
options: Reattempt the request
Cancel the request
Send the file name again
Display an error message
questions.explanation: The client should cancel the request if the server sends a 500 error message.
